# **Sprint Report 1- Cs Life** 

# Team Name: BitByte 

### Members: Marco Nasirpour, Nima Jamshidi, 

Adrian Lopez, Ethan Zarella,   
Saniha Sreedhara 

### Release 1.0, Release Date: 6/30/2026

### Revision: N/A, Revision Date: N/A 

**Action to stop doing:**

	The team should keep the scrum meeting less than 15 minutes. The first time, we met together to introduce ourselves and what the project was about, the meeting lasted around an hour or an hour and half. Another thing the team needs to stop doing is having meetings on Sunday morning, as some of the members cannot make it to those meetings. 

**Action to start doing:** 

	We need to start organizing everything such as creating a Github repository, and creating a shared google drive folder. As of right now we have a shared repository however, some of the files are unorganized and are not well labeled correctly. For example we should have separate files for starting menu and the main main as these files need to have their own separate HTML and CSS files. 

**Actions to keep doing:** 

	The team has been very communicative by messaging through text messages and in the Zoom meets, which has helped us to become more efficient and aware of what everyone needs to do before we start designing and implementing code. 

**Work Completed / Not Completed:**

* Completed User Stories:   
  * As a player, I want to start a new game in which I can choose my name and starting stats  
  *  As a team, we want a Github Scrum board to organize sprint work, assign tasks, and track the progress of each task throughout the sprint  
* Not Completed User Stories:   
  * (Every user story has been completed)

**Work Completion Rate:**

* Total number of user stories completed: 2 (US-1, US-2)  
* Total number of idea working hours: 10 \+ 3 \= 13 hours total  
* Total number of days during sprint 1: 7 days (Wednesday June 24th \- Tuesday June 30th)  
* User stories per day: 2 / 7   
* Ideal work hours per day : 13 / 7 \= 1.857 hours OR 1 hour and 51 minutes
